# Market Search

Search engine for Polymarket and Kalshi prediction markets. Better ranking than the built-in market search (BM25 + volume + LLM-enriched aliases + fuzzy matching). Static site, data refreshes every 30 minutes.

## JSON API (recommended for agents)

A curl-able JSON endpoint runs as a Cloudflare Worker. **Use this if possible ‚Äî it's faster, cheaper, and works without JavaScript execution.**

```
https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?q=YOUR_QUERY
```

Examples:

```
curl 'https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?q=canada'
curl 'https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?q=bitcoin&limit=5'
curl 'https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?q=bitcoin&provider=kalshi&limit=5'
curl 'https://polymarket-search-api.wkr0.workers.dev/?trending=1&limit=10'
```

### Parameters

- `q` (string) ‚Äî search query. Supports typos, abbreviations, nicknames.
- `provider` (string) ‚Äî market source. Use `kalshi` for Kalshi; defaults to `polymarket`.
- `limit` (int, default 20, max 100) ‚Äî number of results.
- `trending` (any value) ‚Äî when `q` is empty, return top events by volume.
- `archived` (bool) ‚Äî set to `1` to include archived Polymarket markets. Kalshi search currently indexes open events only.

### Response shape

```json
{
  "query": "canada",
  "provider": "polymarket",
  "archived": false,
  "count": 5,
  "meta": {
    "indexes": {
      "active": { "updatedAt": "2026-06-10T02:00:00Z", "events": 4642 },
      "archived": null
    }
  },
  "results": [
    {
      "q": "Event title",
      "s": "event-slug",
      "ed": "2026-12-31",
      "im": "https://...image url",
      "v": 12345,
      "vt": 678901,
      "tg": ["Tag1", "Tag2"],
      "mc": 3,
      "mk": [
        {
          "l": "Outcome label",
          "op": [0.42, 0.58],
          "bid": 0.41,
          "ask": 0.43,
          "last": 0.42
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Field reference:
- `meta.indexes.active.updatedAt` ‚Äî active index build timestamp. In the browser UI, visible active-market prices may be refreshed live after render; Worker/API results use the bundled index prices.
- `meta.indexes.active.events` ‚Äî active index event count
- `meta.indexes.archived` ‚Äî archived index timestamp/count when `archived=1`, otherwise null
- `q` ‚Äî event title
- `p` ‚Äî provider. Present as `kalshi` on Kalshi results; absent/undefined means Polymarket.
- `s` ‚Äî provider event id/slug. Polymarket URL: `https://polymarket.com/event/{slug}`.
- `u` ‚Äî direct URL when present. Kalshi results include this.
- `ed` ‚Äî end date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `im` ‚Äî event image URL
- `v` ‚Äî 24h volume in USD
- `vt` ‚Äî total volume in USD
- `tg` ‚Äî Polymarket-assigned tags
- `mc` ‚Äî total markets in event
- `mk` ‚Äî top 5 outcomes by relevance
- `op` ‚Äî [yes_probability, no_probability]. Already normalized for mutually-exclusive events.
- `bid`, `ask`, `last` ‚Äî order book and last trade prices (in dollars, 0-1)

## Fallback: ?format=json on the static page

If you can't use the worker URL, the static site also supports `?format=json` on its URL:

```
https://aburkard.github.io/polymarket-search/?q=canada&format=json
```

This requires a JS-capable fetcher (headless browser, Playwright, Puppeteer) because the JSON is rendered client-side. **Prefer the worker URL above when possible.**

## Data refresh

Index rebuilds every 30 minutes via GitHub Actions. `meta.indexes.*.updatedAt` is the index build timestamp, not a live price-refresh timestamp. Live prices for displayed active Polymarket results are fetched from Polymarket's Gamma API on demand by the browser UI only. Kalshi results, archived results, and Worker/API responses use bundled index prices.

## Source

https://github.com/aburkard/polymarket-search
